commands.review_summary:
Updates the website install copy, localized site messages, Homebrew release playbook, and changelog to describe the official Homebrew cask as universal on Intel and Apple silicon.

Reproducibility: not applicable. as a bug reproduction; the mismatch is source-verifiable because current main still describes Homebrew as Apple Silicon-only while the current official cask is universal with no architecture restriction.

target.title: docs: clarify universal Homebrew cask
target.body:
Closes #1193

## Summary

- Describe the official Homebrew cask as universal on Intel and Apple silicon.
- Update the English website fallback and all 21 localized `hero.fineprint` / `detail.installBody` messages.
- Remove the stale arm64-only instruction from the Homebrew release playbook.
- Add changelog credit for the original Intel support report.

## Proof

Exact reviewed head: `58630abe10d73d6c5bed83d9fb52db0eba9be8e9`

- Current official cask v0.36.1 downloads `CodexBar-macos-universal-#{version}.zip`, requires macOS Sonoma, and has no architecture restriction.
- `node Scripts/check-site-locales.mjs` passes: 21 locales, 50 site messages.
- `make docs-list` passes.
- `make check` passes with zero SwiftFormat or SwiftLint findings.
- Final autoreview reports no actionable findings, confidence 0.92.
- Existing-profile Chrome visual smoke passes for English, German, and RTL Arabic: updated hero/install copy renders without clipping; provider grid, install cards, and RTL layout remain intact.
